caption: The video displays a series of four identical financial bar charts titled "Daily Exchange Volume Chart." Each chart features a horizontal x-axis with dates ranging from "Mar 08" to "Apr 11" and a vertical y-axis measuring volume from 0 to 40,000. A legend in the upper right corner identifies blue bars as "Future" and red bars as "Option." The blue bars show fluctuating volumes over time, with a noticeable peak occurring around early April. The red bars are nearly invisible, appearing as thin lines along the baseline. A circular watermark logo is visible in the background behind the charts. Across the sequence, the charts remain static, showing no change in data points, layout, or text, effectively presenting a still image of financial data repeated over time.
